title: Delicate Indian Lentil Dal
description: An earthy and energizing Indian dish featuring lentils and fermented jang, with a low calorie count and a hint of praline flavor from the caramelized onions.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and soak them in water for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and caramelize the onions for 20 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and saute for 1 minute.
Add the cumin seeds and turmeric to the pan and saute for 1 minute.
Add the soaked lentils, water, fermented jang, and salt to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the dal for 30 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree the dal to the desired consistency.
Serve the dal hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
